checks.description: Front-door shell copy and startup framing
Help, settings, leaderboard, account, and feedback panels
Frame-sized popout bounds and one-open-overlay switching
Pilot records and account replay panel surface
Leaderboard build/date trust context and filtering
Graphics options and visible rendering controls
Production developer lock and Root backdoor

profile.title: Audio Cue Alignment Correspondence
profile.purpose: Compare the most timing-sensitive Aurora gameplay audio cues against the shipped local baseline and the preserved Galaga-aligned timing targets.

metrics.label: First Stage Pulse After Formation Arrival
Game Start Tail Past First Pulse
Result Cue Tail Past Next Cue
First Stage Pulse After Formation Arrival
Game Start Tail Past First Pulse
Result Cue Tail Past Next Cue

audioEventGapRun.nextStep: Tune the highest segment-level gap next: challengeResults onset. Rerun audio comparison and event-gap analysis after the change.

categories.label: Player movement conformance
categories.read: Current movement scored 10/10 against the control-principles profile, versus 10/10 for the shipped local baseline.

categories.label: Shot and hit responsiveness
categories.read: Close-shot responsiveness passed, and movement-fire post-shot travel was 54.28, with shot delay 1ms.

categories.label: Stage-1 opening timing fidelity
categories.read: 4/4 metrics were within tolerance; worst current delta was 0.18.

categories.label: Stage-1 opening geometry fidelity
categories.read: Geometry held steady with 0 changed targets and max drift 0.

categories.label: Dive fairness and safety
categories.read: Shared stage-2 safety seeds passed, which keeps the early dive/collision windows within the intended persona guardrail.

categories.label: Capture and rescue rule fidelity
categories.read: 3/3 capture scenarios matched, with worst tracked-time drift 0.004.

categories.label: Challenge-stage timing fidelity
categories.read: 5/5 challenge timing metrics were within tolerance; worst current delta was 0.483.

categories.label: Progression and persona depth
categories.read: 20/20 persona checks passed; progression ordering is still missing one ordering edge case.

categories.label: Boss entry and formation grammar

weakestMetric.label: Path shape and set-formation precision
weakestMetric.calculation: Direct motion-hint and formation slot-coordinate evidence coverage. This intentionally remains low until frame-level path extraction is promoted.
weakestMetric.currentRead: 0 motion hints and 0 formation slot hints across 6 windows.
weakestMetric.success: Frame-level boss/escort/challenge path traces and formation slot positions are available for direct reference comparison.

strongestMetric.label: Boss entry timing
strongestMetric.calculation: 35% regular-window boss presence plus 65% first boss timing fit against early/mid/late stage-band timing windows.
strongestMetric.currentRead: 5/5 regular windows expose boss presence; mean timing fit 1.
strongestMetric.success: Regular-stage boss appearances land in stage-band timing windows and vary enough over time to feel authored.

details.topProblem: Boss/escort path-shape and formation-slot precision are not yet extracted from frame evidence, so the scorer can see event grammar before it can see true path-authenticity.
details.strategy: Promote boss/escort/challenge path traces, formation slot coordinates, and stage-family entry labels into the ingestion corpus, then use this scorer to rank stage scripts and runtime changes.
details.successMeasure: Raise this family above 8.0/10 with path-shape precision above 5.0/10, minimum regular-stage signature distance above 0.16, and at least two challenge windows with distinct pattern identity.

categories.read: Boss/formation grammar scores 6.9/10 across 6 evidence windows; weakest metric is Path shape and set-formation precision (0/10).

categories.label: Level arc and encounter shape

strongestSubmetric.label: Challenge-stage identity
strongestSubmetric.read: 5/5 challenge timing checks pass and 3/3 content layers are blueprinted; opportunity-window readiness is 7.8/10.

weakestSubmetric.label: Boss entry and formation grammar
weakestSubmetric.read: Boss/formation grammar scores 6.9/10; weakest metric is Path shape and set-formation precision (0/10).

nextRecommendedWork: improve Stage 4 pressure replay precision so source loss windows reproduce as exact deterministic windows
preserve stage-8 flank and stage-14 escort grammar while adding the next measured challenge/reward slice
advance boss/formation grammar by targeting Path shape and set-formation precision: 0 motion hints and 0 formation slot hints across 6 windows.

mid-run-entry-variant and mid-run-pressure are too similar by computed gameplay signature distance (0.106). Strategy: Use the feature trace to add one distinct movement/reward grammar to the weaker window, then rerun stage-signature distance.
implement one challenge-stage movement and reward slice with clear perfect/near-perfect feedback

categories.read: Level arc score is 8.3/10 with 6/6 stage families blueprinted and 6/6 evidence windows present; weakest submetric is Boss entry and formation grammar (7/10).

categories.label: Audio identity and cue alignment
categories.read: Audio score blends cue identity, active reference similarity, reference-window precision, overlap timing, cue alignment, and semantic event mapping. 0/21 reference windows still need tighter segmentation; 25 candidate subwindows were found; semantic event score is 9.76/10 with 0 semantic attention rows and 0 shared-reference risks.

categories.label: UI, shell, and graphics integrity
categories.read: The bundled front-door, panel, dock, graphics, attract, leaderboard, and audio shell surface suite passed.

strongestCategory.read: Current movement scored 10/10 against the control-principles profile, versus 10/10 for the shipped local baseline.
